'''wayuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headgear|headgear]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headgear|headgear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wayuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæyikith|wæyikith]] || [[word:wæyikij|wæyikij]] || [[word:wæyikish|wæyikish]] || [[word:wæyiki|wæyiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wayuyukuth|wayuyukuth]] || [[word:wayuyukuj|wayuyukuj]] || [[word:wayuyukush|wayuyukush]] || [[word:wayuyuku|wayuyuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wayukuth|wayukuth]] || [[word:wayukuj|wayukuj]] || [[word:wayukush|wayukush]] || [[word:wayuku|wayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wayufkuth|wayufkuth]] || [[word:wayufkuj|wayufkuj]] || [[word:wayufkush|wayufkush]] || [[word:wayufkuf|wayufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wayukuthu|wayukuthu]] || [[word:wayukuju|wayukuju]] || [[word:wayukushu|wayukushu]] || [[word:wayukuku|wayukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wayukuth|wayukuth]] || [[word:wayukuj|wayukuj]] || [[word:wayukush|wayukush]] || [[word:wayuku|wayuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wayukuthul|wayukuthul]] || [[word:wayukujul|wayukujul]] || [[word:wayukushul|wayukushul]] || [[word:wayukukul|wayukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wayukuthuthu|wayukuthuthu]] || [[word:wayukujuju|wayukujuju]] || [[word:wayukushushu|wayukushushu]] || [[word:wayukuku|wayukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wayukuthun|wayukuthun]] || [[word:wayukujun|wayukujun]] || [[word:wayukushun|wayukushun]] || [[word:wayukukun|wayukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wayukuthuoro|wayukuthuoro]] || [[word:wayukujuoro|wayukujuoro]] || [[word:wayukushuoro|wayukushuoro]] || [[word:wayukukuoro|wayukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
